criteriaResults.criterion: Replace prIsDraft with prReviewState throughout state machine, fetch, workflows
criteriaResults.evidence: Zero prIsDraft/isDraft references in daemon source. prReviewState used in types.ts, fetch.ts, decision.ts, state-delta.ts, feedback.ts, server.ts
fetch.ts:258-259 — latestReviews(first:1) GraphQL query. 47 fetch tests pass.
decision.ts:101-126 — null→retry, changes_requested→resume_implementer, approved→retro. 88 decision tests pass.

criteriaResults.criterion: Review workflow removes draft toggling, uses gh pr review
criteriaResults.evidence: Zero draft/gh-pr-ready references in review.md. Uses gh pr review --approve/--request-changes.
state/AGENTS.md references getPrReviewStateBatch. Controller SKILL.md updated.

documentationFeedback: PR description thorough and accurate. AGENTS.md files correctly updated.
observations: latestReviews(first:1) captures only most recent reviewer — fine for single-reviewer-bot architecture
Test quality: decision tests strong, fetch tests adequate, integration/delta tests mechanical
